testcase.name: Authentication › logs in with valid credentials and stores the user profile
Authentication › rejects invalid credentials
Authentication › persists the authenticated session after reload
Authentication › logs out and clears the session cache
Authentication › blocks weak passwords in signup before hitting the backend
Authentication › blocks weak passwords in the profile password-change flow
Authorization Security › admin can access /api/users but staff receives 403
Authorization Security › staff only gets safe task-context users while admin-only activity feed stays protected
Authorization Security › file downloads require authentication
System Responsiveness › tasks workspace responds within a reasonable budget
System Responsiveness › notifications unread-count endpoint returns quickly for the active user
System Responsiveness › tasks page shell loads without hanging
Task Management › admin can create a task and see it in the workspace and UI
Task Management › authenticated upload returns a secure download URL that works for the same user
Task Management › staff can read the workspace but cannot create admin-only tasks
Authentication › logs in with valid credentials and stores the user profile
Authentication › rejects invalid credentials
Authentication › persists the authenticated session after reload
Authentication › logs out and clears the session cache
Authentication › blocks weak passwords in signup before hitting the backend
Authentication › blocks weak passwords in the profile password-change flow
Authorization Security › admin can access /api/users but staff receives 403
Authorization Security › staff only gets safe task-context users while admin-only activity feed stays protected
Authorization Security › file downloads require authentication
System Responsiveness › tasks workspace responds within a reasonable budget
System Responsiveness › notifications unread-count endpoint returns quickly for the active user
System Responsiveness › tasks page shell loads without hanging
Task Management › admin can create a task and see it in the workspace and UI
Task Management › authenticated upload returns a secure download URL that works for the same user
Task Management › staff can read the workspace but cannot create admin-only tasks
